name: definely
description: Word add-in for contract drafting (definitions, cross-references, clause libraries). Anthropic legal-partner-listed (May 2026). Integration is primarily Word-side; surface through MCP for clause-library queries.
notes: Definely's MCP shape is documented but the official server is not yet published. v1 uses direct REST; the small-firm profile defaults to enabling it because Word-based drafting is the dominant workflow.
